title: GoThru 3D Floormap API Go Project Report

issues.display_title: Issue #1: Project Foundation and API Initialization
issues.main_description_html:
RESULT 18/06/26

✅ Implementation Complete — Ready for Unit Testing

Implementation :

e355def

Description

This task covers the initial setup of the gothru-maps-backend-go project. The goal is to establish a robust, modular, and scalable architecture using Go Fiber and GORM, following the architectural patterns of the reference repository.

Architecture Overview

  • Actions: Contain business logic and interact with the framework context (fiber.Ctx).
  • Controllers: Serve as thin entry points that delegate requests to Actions.
  • Routes: Organized by version (v1) and module, orchestrated by a central route manager.
  • Config: Centralized initialization for databases (MySQL/Postgres), Redis, and RabbitMQ.

Tech Stack

  • Language: Go 1.25.5
  • Web Framework: Fiber v2
  • ORM: GORM
  • Database Drivers: MySQL, PostgreSQL
  • Middleware: Logger, Recover
  • Services: Redis, RabbitMQ (AMQP)

Implementation Checklist

1. Environment & Dependencies

  • Initialize go.mod with core dependencies (Fiber, GORM, UUID, AMQP, Redis).
  • Create .env template for local configuration (Port, Database credentials).

2. Project Structure

  • Create standardized directory tree (cmd/api, cmd/workers, src/action/v1, src/controllers/v1, src/routes/v1, src/config, src/models, src/lib).

3. Core Implementation (Placeholder/Dev Module)

  • Implement Ping Action to handle health checks.
  • Implement Ping Controller as the API bridge.
  • Configure Route versioning (/api/v1) and register the dev module.
  • Set up Main Route Orchestrator to manage all module routes.

4. Main Application Entry Point

  • Implement cmd/api/main.go (config init, middleware, server startup, graceful exit, dynamic port binding).

Verification Result

  • Build Status: Success (Tested via go build).
  • Endpoints: GET /api/v1/ping verified.
  • Dependency Check: All requested libraries resolved in go.mod.

Source: docs/task/PROJECT_INIT_TASK.md
